semantic.role: Define naming conventions for the codebase to ensure consistency and facilitate automated enforcement.
responsibilities: Specify the requirement for internal interfaces to be prefixed with 'I' (e.g., IUserRepository).
Specify the requirement for test files to end with .test.ts or .spec.ts.
Document severity levels for each rule (Warning for interface prefix, Error for test file suffix).
outOfScope: Naming conventions for classes, enums, or non-interface types.
File naming outside of types and tests directories.
General coding style or formatting rules.

English.purpose: This document exists to establish and enforce a set of naming conventions across a large monorepo, ensuring code style consistency and improving developer productivity by making code patterns predictable.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers working on the monorepo, especially those adding new interfaces or test files. It serves as a reference for both manual code review and automated linting rules.
key_takeaways: All internal interfaces in src/types/**/*.ts must be prefixed with 'I'.
All test files in tests/** must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts.
Violations of the prefix rule produce a warning; violations of the suffix rule produce an error.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档旨在为大型 monorepo 建立并强制执行一套命名约定，确保代码风格一致性，并通过可预测的代码模式提升开发效率。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于在 monorepo 中工作的开发人员，特别是添加新接口或测试文件的开发者。该文档可作为代码审查和自动化 lint 规则的参考。
key_takeaways: 所有位于 src/types/**/*.ts 中的内部接口必须以 'I' 开头。
所有位于 tests/** 中的测试文件必须以 .test.ts 或 .spec.ts 结尾。
违反前缀规则会触发警告；违反后缀规则会触发错误。
